scenes.title: The Restaurant Kitchen
scenes.background_prompt: A busy restaurant kitchen with stainless steel counters, a gas range, hanging pots, a pass-through window, and bright overhead lights. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A busy restaurant kitchen with bright overhead fluorescent lights. A chef in a white double-breasted coat and a tall white toque stands at a gas range, holding a skillet with one hand and flipping a golden pancake into the air — the pancake hovers mid-flip above the pan, perfectly round. His other hand is poised to catch the pan's handle. A waitress in a black apron over a white shirt passes behind him carrying two plates of food, one in each hand, heading toward the pass-through window. Stainless steel counters line the walls, and copper pots hang from an overhead rack. A ticket rail above the pass-through window holds several paper order slips.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place chef at the gas range, standing and holding a skillet with one hand, flipping a golden pancake mid-air above the pan. Place waitress passing behind him, carrying two plates of food toward the pass-through window.
scenes.scene_description: In the far left foreground of this children's picture-book kitchen scene, a stainless steel cabinet with a single door sits below a large stainless steel stove. The stove has four burners, one of which is lit with a blue flame, and four circular control knobs on its front panel. A chef stands in front of the stove, facing right in a dynamic posture. He is a man with a cheerful expression, wearing a tall white chef's hat, a white double-breasted jacket with four visible buttons, a yellow and white checkered neckerchief, blue trousers, and brown boots. He holds a black frying pan in his right hand, tossing a golden-brown pancake into the air. Above the stove is a large, dark green ventilation hood. On the white-tiled wall behind the chef, a large silver frying pan, a medium silver pot, a small silver pot, and a ladle hang from a rack. To the right of these, two knives are attached to a magnetic strip, and below them, a ceramic jar holds various kitchen utensils. In the center of the scene, the floor is composed of large, light brown square tiles. Behind the chef is a long stainless steel prep counter where a white bowl with a spoon, a smaller white bowl, and a white jar containing wooden spoons are placed. Behind this counter is a large rectangular pass-through window looking into a dining area with pink booths and a round table. To the right of the prep counter, a waitress walks toward the right side of the frame. She has brown hair tied in a bun with a green hairband and a smiling face, wearing a short-sleeved green dress with a white collar, a white apron with yellow trim and a leaf design, blue and white striped socks, and brown shoes. She carries two white plates, each containing a piece of meat and green vegetables. Behind her, a stainless steel shelving unit contains stacks of bowls and a pot. Further right, a stainless steel counter features several bottles, including a green glass bottle and a brown glass bottle, along with a jar. Above this counter are shelves holding stacks of white bowls and plates and a small yellow bottle. In the far right background, a window reveals a bright blue sky with white clouds and orange-colored trees under a clear daytime sky. The ceiling features a rectangular light fixture that casts a warm glow over the entire setting.

CH: cheerful chef in a white hat
smiling waitress in a green dress
S: sunny day visible through the window
IE: chef tossing a pancake into the air
waitress carrying two plates of food
IR: chef feeling proud of his cooking
waitress feeling happy to serve guests
P: chef trying to flip the pancake perfectly
waitress aiming to deliver the meals
A: flipping a pancake with a frying pan
walking across the tiled kitchen floor
CO: pancake soaring above the hot stove
meals ready for the hungry customers

ENP: stainless steel stove with blue flames
green dress with a white apron
SC: while the chef flips the pancake
as the waitress walks to the dining room
